sichuanese: 合作之后甘欣儿你把我当瓜娃子嗦咹这么两年了咹
english_ref: Gan Xiner, after all these years working together, you've been treating me like a fool?
pred_glm: After all this time working together, Gan Xin'er, have you really been treating me like a fool for the past two years?
pred_deepseek: After we worked together, Gan Xin'er, you took me for a fool, huh? After all these two years, huh?
analysis_note: Human: only DS preserves 瓜娃子 insult force (嗦/当…瓜娃子). COMET +14 favors GLM’s bland “treating me like a fool” — textbook metric–culture inversion.

sichuanese: 哦超级的安逸看到我就选了几根选了三根根儿
